items.title: Thailand's divisive ex-PM is out of jail, but is the Thaksin era over?
items.dek: Thaksin seems incapable of taking a back seat. This time, it really could be different.
items.body: Thaksin seems incapable of taking a back seat. This time, it really could be different.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Dua Lipa sues Samsung for $15m over use of her image on TV boxes
items.dek: The pop star's legal team alleges a photograph of her face was used on Samsung television boxes without permission.
items.body: The pop star's legal team alleges a photograph of her face was used on Samsung television boxes without permission.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
items.dek: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.
items.body: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.
items.author: IriLine Desk
